name: openclaw-docs-rag
description: Zero-dependency OpenClaw docs retrieval using llms.txt + markdown fetching. No API keys required — retrieves real-time documentation content directly from the OpenClaw docs site.
review: Zero-dependency, zero-API-key real-time OpenClaw docs retrieval using llms.txt — genuinely novel and immediately useful for OpenClaw users. Active maintenance and clean security posture. Minor issues: legacy deps in package.json, committed build artifacts, and incomplete SKILL.md frontmatter.

drax_results.notes: Full query returned real OpenClaw docs with content. End-to-end verified.
